📰 18-race maiden but he returned to some form when third of 13 over this C&D 24 days ago, albeit he didn't help his chance by hanging left; may be able to build on that.

2 Oasis Sunrise 4 Bated Breath / Oasis Dream 3.0 9-8 (-1) Rossa Ryan Grace Harris 69 38 662-52 51.0 19.7% 5.1 5.5 2.88 -16.6pp
📰 Sole win from 28 starts came over this C&D on firm ground last summer; built on her reappearance when runner-up here 12 days ago (good to soft) and she will have no issue with the likely quicker ground conditions; major contender.
🧠 Main danger. Modest ratings for this level; modest recent form, on a declining curve; going conditions are ideal; good course record, top jockey booked; market price confirms model confidence.

3 Clipsham Noble 2 Mehmas / Invincible Spirit 7.0 9-0 (-9) Liam Wright(5) Charlie Clover 67 63 065-46 47.4 11.8% 8.4 8.6 8.50 -0.1pp
📰 Has won once from 25 starts, namely at Brighton last June in first-time cheekpieces for Alice Haynes; fourth at Southwell on his stable debut but failed to build on that at Nottingham (8.5f, good) 11 days ago.
🧠 Modest ratings for this level; modest recent form.
4 Havana Mojito (GB) 8 Havana Grey / Kheleyf 0.7 9-9 Luke Morris John Gallagher 68 60 67860- 47.4 11.8% 8.5 8.6 17.00 +5.8pp
📰 Below his best when last seen but he started last season well, being beaten a neck on his reappearance before winning his next two starts (all at Brighton), and returns from a 176-day break off a mark 2lb below the latest success; may bounce back.
🧠 Modest ratings for this level; modest recent form, on a declining curve; good course record, in-form trainer (John Gallagher).
🧢 18W/177R 10% IV 0.91
5 Baynoona 3 Oasis Dream / Dalakhani 3.0 9-3 (-6) Millie Wonnacott(5) Sue Gardner 68 50 4135-5 45.6 9.2% 10.8 10.3 6.00 -7.0pp
📰 Sole win from 17 starts came over C&D in September (good to soft); ran well here on quicker ground next time and left the impression her first start for 167 days was needed when fifth on her most recent start; has claims.
🧠 Modest ratings for this level; good course record.

        "dam_sire": "Duke Of Marmalade",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "10-9",
        "score": "53.8",
        "model_pct": "18.5%",
        "fair_odds": "5.41",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "+12.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ran twice over 1m4f at Roscommon for Jack Davison last summer, finishing third on debut (good) before seeing off 14 rivals on soft ground a fortnight later; can win more races for new connections (sold for 75,000gns last October) but he drops in trip on faster ground and has to concede chunks of weight to some promising 3yos so this might not be one of them."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Leighton (GB)",
        "jockey": "Robert Havlin",
        "trainer": "John & Thady Gosden",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "65",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "5-",
        "sire": "Frankel",
        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "51.9",
        "model_pct": "15.6%",
        "fair_odds": "6.40",
        "best_dec": "3.50",
        "edge": "-15.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Top-class middle-distance pedigree, by Frankel out of a Group 1 winner in these colours; 2-1 joint-favourite for his Kempton debut in November (1m) but ran green and couldn't threaten in a race won by a smart prospect; should be a different proposition this year now his stamina is being drawn out."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Why Not Win",
        "jockey": "P J McDonald",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Ghaiyyath",
        "dam_sire": "Tiger Hill",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "46.5",
        "model_pct": "9.7%",
        "fair_odds": "10.34",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+5.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "12th foal; closely related to winners Akeed Mofeed (7f-1m2f including 2yo/Hong Kong Group 1; RPR 120) and Jordan Sport (6f-7f including UAE dirt Group 3; 116), half-brother to four more including Wonder Laish (11.6f-2m1f Flat, 100; useful 2m hurdler); dam unraced; has a fair standard to aim at on debut but can't be ignored."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Night Wolf (GB)",
        "jockey": "Dale Swift",
        "trainer": "Seb Spencer",
        "ts": "69",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "53-",
        "sire": "Kodi Bear",
        "dam_sire": "Pivotal",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "43.8",
        "model_pct": "7.6%",
        "fair_odds": "13.15",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "-5.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Promising debut in a traditionally strong York maiden last August (7f, good to firm; trained by John and Sean Quinn); couldn't build on it on a slower surface at Redcar in October (stable debut); remains with potential and this trip should suit on pedigree."
      }
    ]
  },
  {

        "best_dec": "2.38",
        "edge": "-9.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Pick of Flat form when close third at Lingfield last June (11.6f; turf; Betelgeuse behind); won twice over hurdles since and is now asked to go further back on the level; interesting candidate."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Volcanic Rock (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Saeed bin Suroor",
        "ts": "68",
        "rpr": "78",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "36-08",
        "sire": "Ghaiyyath",
        "dam_sire": "Exceed And Excel",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "57.9",
        "model_pct": "33.4%",
        "fair_odds": "2.99",
        "best_dec": "3.75",
        "edge": "+6.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sent off odds on when debuting here last November but could manage only third and has gone backwards in UAE since; enough to prove on this marked step up in trip sporting a tongue-tie for the first time, for all that Oisin Murphy has a remarkable record for the trainer in the last five years (22-49; +40.94)."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Betelgeuse (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Kieran O'Neill",
        "trainer": "S Woods",
        "ts": "70",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "5615-2",
        "sire": "Almanzor",
        "dam_sire": "Turtle Bowl",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "51.4",
        "model_pct": "13.1%",
        "fair_odds": "7.65",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-5.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has form figures of 152, all over 1m6f here, since a gelding operation; routed eight rivals then proved bitterly disappointing 15 days later; back from over five months off with fine second a fortnight ago (pair clear; PB); major player if putting best foot forward."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Clansman",
        "jockey": "Toby Moore(7)",
        "trainer": "Liam Bailey",
        "ts": "78",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "69",
        "form": "-32133",
        "sire": "Nathaniel",
        "dam_sire": "Nureyev",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "50.7",
        "model_pct": "11.8%",
        "fair_odds": "8.44",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Possible front-runner; high marks for consistency this year and managed a win at Newcastle in March; Toby Moore got a good tune out of him here the following month; sound claims."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Dollar's Dream (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Cam Hardie",
        "trainer": "Philip Kirby",
        "ts": "81",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "56",
        "form": "75-225",
        "sire": "Phoenix Of Spain",
        "dam_sire": "Danehill",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "8-6",
        "score": "47.0",
        "model_pct": "6.9%",
        "fair_odds": "14.55",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-2.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Very pleasing second, behind one who readily followed up next time, over the extended 2m at Newcastle in January; passed up a good opportunity next time and looked awkward under pressure latest (both 1m6f here); others preferred."
      }
    ]
  },

        "spotlight": "Won over 1m6f at Salisbury (good to soft) for Daisy Hitchins last summer; has been running creditably in defeat over hurdles since joining Tristan Davidson, including placed twice here; leading claims back on the Flat in a race where her rivals have something to prove."

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Revitalised in blinkers and ended 2025 with victories over C&D (good to soft) and at Hamilton (1m4f, soft) in September; went without the blinkers when always behind on his Thirsk reappearance 11 days ago but could fare a lot better with the headgear back in place now."

        "cd": "",

        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "+5.3pp",

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "April foal; price rose from 26,000euros to 65,000gns as a yearling; second foal out of unraced sister to 1m2f winner Wondrous Words; local trainer yet to have a 2yo winner since starting up in Britain but market check wise."
      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "It's a long time since he won but he was a close third over C&D (good to soft) last September and was an encouraging sixth of 18 on reappearance at Thirsk (6f, good); refitted with cheekpieces (which are combined with his tongue-tie) for the first time since a win at Nottingham in autumn 2023; non-runner here on Sunday with a vet's certificate."

  {

    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Walsingham (IRE)",

        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "81",
        "rpr": "99",
        "or": "84",

        "fair_odds": "4.28",
        "best_dec": "4.33",
        "edge": "-0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Completed a hat-trick last summer with the first two legs coming over C&D (good ground); promising third at Ripon on his seasonal return two weeks ago, keeping on well from 2f out having earlier clipped a rival's heels as the race was hotting up; still has more to offer and the drying ground is the only imponderable (unraced on faster than good)."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "On The River",
        "jockey": "P J McDonald",
        "trainer": "Harriet Bethell",
        "ts": "80",
        "rpr": "98",
        "or": "80",

        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "59.5",
        "model_pct": "17.4%",
        "fair_odds": "5.75",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won last summer's Carlisle Bell off this mark (1m, soft); ran well when fifth in the Spring Mile at Doncaster on his return before finding only his stablemate Milteye too strong at Ripon 13 days ago (1m, good to soft; Walsingham back in third); fully effective over C&D but he appears to have a preference for slower than good now and drying conditions aren't sure to suit."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Sailthisshipalone",
        "jockey": "George Wood",
        "trainer": "Ivan Furtado",
        "ts": "96",
        "rpr": "96",
        "or": "78",
        "form": "8717-1",
        "sire": "Havana Gold",
        "dam_sire": "Equiano",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "58.8",
        "model_pct": "16.0%",
        "fair_odds": "6.25",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-7.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Soft-ground win for Richard Fahey last November (1m); tongue tied for the first time when making a winning stable debut over C&D three weeks ago (good to soft); 3lb higher in a better race and going without cheekpieces today; handles good ground but perhaps wouldn't want it any faster."
      },

        "rank": 4,

        "ts": "88",
        "rpr": "96",

        "stall": 2,

        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-3.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Added another two 1m wins to his CV in 2025, including on AW when last seen in November; this 2lb higher mark shouldn't prove beyond him but his record fresh, allied to the absence of cheekpieces (worn on last seven starts), suggest this may not be his day."
      },

        "spotlight": "Ran out the easy winner of the corresponding event (good ground) on his reappearance last April; also successful at Haydock in August and that win came off a 2lb higher mark; interesting on return from a six-month break."
      },

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two turf wins at around 1m on good ground last summer, the second of them coming off a 1lb higher mark; not far off his best form when fourth at Lingfield early this month but he has since finished a remote 11th at Musselburgh; not a solid option."
      },
      {

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three wins last May/July at about 1m on various ground and he's back down to his last winning mark; ended 2025 quietly and there's a suspicion he'll improve for this comeback run; withdrawn after getting upset in the stalls at Ripon two weeks ago (25-1 at the time)."
      },

        "edge": "+1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Veteran with 14 wins to his name, two of them coming over C&D; ended 2025 quietly and he finished behind a couple of today's rivals at Ripon on his reappearance 13 days ago; on a dangerous mark but he may need another run before he is of major interest."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Vincent Rocks",

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won novice races at Nottingham (8.3f, good to soft) and Southwell (1m, AW) on his first two starts; flopped on handicap debut last September (1m2f, good to soft) and he was out the back in the Spring Mile on his reappearance 32 days ago; down in class but he needs the cheekpieces/faster ground to turn things around."
      }
    ]
  },

        "spotlight": "Better effort here 39 days ago despite still looking green; dam winning over 1m4f offers hope for this marked step up in trip; betting useful on handicap debut."
      },

        "rank": 5,

        "fair_odds": "14.15",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Soundly beaten in trio of Irish maidens at up to 8.3f on turf last year for Kevin Coleman; probably best watched unless the betting speaks positively."
      },

        "rank": 6,

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "No forlorn hope on runs two and three last year, and moving up in trip promises to suit, but he's entitled to strip fitter for this return; gelded in his time off; AW/handicap debut."
      },

        "rank": 7,

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Yet to make the frame but came closest to doing so on his return at Ripon 13 days ago (1m; following wind surgery); new trip raises a question."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Musselburgh",

    "type": "flat",

    "dist": "7f",

    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Counting Cards (GB)",

        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "2/27-4",
        "sire": "Territories",
        "dam_sire": "Iffraaj",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "53.7",
        "model_pct": "18.3%",
        "fair_odds": "5.47",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "+4.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Lightly raced 4yo who returned from an absence to finish runner-up off 2lb higher on his 1m Southwell handicap debut last October; too keen when failing to reproduce that form in two subsequent AW outings around the turn of the year but possible he could pack more punch at the finish if a first-time hood (combined with tongue-tie) helps him to settle better; runner-up on turf (good to firm) as a juvenile."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Qazaq",
        "jockey": "Greg Fairley",
        "trainer": "Iain Jardine",
        "ts": "71",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "67",
        "form": "683872",
        "sire": "Kingman",
        "dam_sire": "Scat Daddy",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "52.1",
        "model_pct": "13.9%",
        "fair_odds": "7.18",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-9.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Drawn a blank since winning first three starts for Roger Varian but surely would have put that right over C&D (good) last time with more luck in running, going down by only a head despite being repeatedly denied a run in the penultimate furlong; might need the breaks if he's dropped in from the outside stall but still has to be high on the list."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Giorgio M",
        "jockey": "Jack Nicholls(5)",
        "trainer": "Mark Loughnane",
        "ts": "82",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "-63764",
        "sire": "Profitable",
        "dam_sire": "Machiavellian",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "51.1",
        "model_pct": "11.8%",
        "fair_odds": "8.49",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made all in 7f handicap at Lingfield off 2lb higher in December; some fair efforts in defeat since, including fourth of 11 at Wolverhampton (7f) four weeks ago; this former C&D scorer is handily drawn for a prominent racer; reasons to be positive with Jack Nicholls taking 5lb off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Criminal Shore",
        "jockey": "Mark Winn",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "78",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "2-4445",
        "sire": "Kodiac",
        "dam_sire": "Noverre",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "50.4",
        "model_pct": "10.6%",
        "fair_odds": "9.44",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-2.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sole win was at Ripon (1m, good) last April but he's run plenty of good races since; last week's fifth of 14 at Newcastle (7f) was another respectable effort but he remains 2lb above the mark he defied at Ripon."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Carolus Magnus (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Joanna Mason",
        "trainer": "Michael & David Easterby",
        "ts": "75",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "64",

        "dam_sire": "Beat Hollow",
        "stall": 6,

        "score": "50.1",
        "model_pct": "10.1%",
        "fair_odds": "9.93",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+3.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "C&D winner (good) last October; also runner-up off today's mark back here in November and could play a prominent role again if fully primed after 134 days off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Tattie Bogle",
        "jockey": "Andrew Mullen",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "68",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "66",
        "form": "3-4253",
        "sire": "Outstrip",
        "dam_sire": "Fantastic Light",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "50.1",
        "model_pct": "10.0%",
        "fair_odds": "10.03",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-7.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Still seeking a first handicap success but he went desperately close at Kempton (7f) last month; sound return to turf when third of nine at Catterick (7f, good) last Wednesday, leading for a long way; respected at a track which suits prominent racers."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Mission Command",
        "jockey": "Paul Mulrennan",
        "trainer": "Jennie Candlish",
        "ts": "65",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "345333",
        "sire": "Acclamation",
        "dam_sire": "Competitive Edge",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "49.9",
        "model_pct": "9.7%",
        "fair_odds": "10.30",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-4.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "It's now 15 starts since his last success but he comes here in good nick, finishing third on turf at Pontefract (1m, good to soft) and Leicester (7f, good) in recent weeks."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "7f maiden win at Dundalk when trained by Kevin Coleman; placed on three of four starts for Katie Scott last August/September, including over C&D (good to soft); has had wind surgery ahead of this first start for seven months."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,

        "edge": "-3.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Never threatened when backed into 7-2 on his stable debut at Newcastle (6f) in January but remains one who could click for this yard and it will be interesting to see whether there is money for him again now back on turf after 95 days off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Just one win from her 17 starts but that came on New Year's Day at Newcastle (6f) and she's largely continued in form there since, placing over 7f on her last three visits; raced only on AW for this yard but her peak RPR was achieved on turf in Ireland."
      }
    ]
  },

        "edge": "-1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ripon maiden win (6f, good) last June on his second start for Tim Easterby; shaped nicely on his return from ten months off back at Ripon two weeks ago, poorly positioned but running the fastest final 2f split to snatch a never-dangerous fifth; should be sharper today and he's interesting off the same mark."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "The Good Biscuit",
        "jockey": "Warren Fentiman(3)",
        "trainer": "Ruth Carr",

        "or": "77",

        "dam_sire": "Exceed And Excel",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "58.6",
        "model_pct": "27.2%",
        "fair_odds": "3.68",
        "best_dec": "2.75",
        "edge": "-11.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two course wins last year, over 6f on good ground in July and 5f on soft in October; pleasing third at Catterick on his reappearance three weeks ago; should go well with Warren Fentiman taking off a useful 3lb."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Sixtygeesbaby",
        "jockey": "Daniel Tudhope",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "69",

        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "54.7",
        "model_pct": "16.6%",
        "fair_odds": "6.04",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-5.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Not at his best in two runs for David O'Meara but on good to soft ground; possible this return to a faster surface will help and he's undoubtedly well handicapped if it does; waters muddied slightly by the stable also having Veblen Good in the race."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Alpha Magic (GB)",

        "trainer": "Michael & David Easterby",
        "ts": "91",
        "rpr": "94",
        "or": "83",
        "form": "/3010-",
        "sire": "Ardad",
        "dam_sire": "Alflora",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "52.3",

        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "+1.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Disappointed at Ayr when last seen 282 days ago; he had looked promising beforehand though and still has potential; can go well fresh but he is held by Sixtygeesbaby on their Doncaster run 12 months ago."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Mystical Storm (GB)",
        "jockey": "Ryan Sexton",
        "trainer": "Julie Camacho",
        "ts": "80",
        "rpr": "95",
        "or": "72",
        "form": "14890-",
        "sire": "Harry Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Rock Of Gibraltar",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "8-10",
        "score": "50.3",
        "model_pct": "9.4%",
        "fair_odds": "10.66",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+3.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Underwent wind surgery prior to his Doncaster novice success last July (6f, good); ran well in a 7f handicap at York two weeks later but his form dropped off afterwards; gelded during his absence; dangerous mark but may find others having his measure now back from a break."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Veblen Good (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Cian Horgan(5)",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "75",
        "rpr": "95",
        "or": "87",
        "form": "/2467-",
        "sire": "Starspangledbanner",
        "dam_sire": "Acclamation",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-11",
        "score": "48.4",
        "model_pct": "7.3%",
        "fair_odds": "13.63",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-10.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "AW winner (5f) for Karl Burke as a 2yo; ran well over C&D on last season's reappearance and his fourth in a big field at York on his handicap debut came off a 3lb higher mark; two subsequent efforts are excusable (Listed company and then 7f on slow ground); sold for 32,000gns in October; unexposed as a sprinter and now drops in class; stable also runs Sixtygeesbaby."
      }
    ]
  },
  {

    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,

        "ts": "63",

        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-9",

        "fair_odds": "4.05",
        "best_dec": "3.00",
        "edge": "-11.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Having dropped back down to her last winning mark she's scored on her reappearance at Beverley (8.4f, turf) a fortnight ago; strong claims back up 3lb provided the return to Tapeta isn't an issue."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Welljudged",

        "trainer": "Roger Varian",
        "ts": "57",
        "rpr": "82",
        "or": "70",
        "form": "232-53",

        "dam_sire": "Galileo",

        "fair_odds": "4.85",
        "best_dec": "3.75",
        "edge": "-8.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Disappointing at Wolverhampton (8.6f, Tapeta) in January on sole handicap start but she showed promise previously (including here) and 7f looked inadequate in a maiden at Chelmsford in February last time, when third; could play a leading role back up in trip and back in a handicap."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,

        "jockey": "Dylan Hogan",

        "ts": "68",
        "rpr": "83",

        "form": "122186",

        "dam_sire": "Royal Applause",
        "stall": 3,

        "fair_odds": "7.24",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "+4.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three wins this year (two over C&D) and bounced back from disappointing Newcastle run with close sixth of eight over C&D this month, when the slow pace was against her; possible player."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Donna Nook (GB)",
        "jockey": "David Nolan",

        "ts": "56",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "70",
        "form": "3-8343",

        "dam_sire": "Arch",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "53.8",
        "model_pct": "12.3%",
        "fair_odds": "8.11",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-5.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-15 since winning in December 2024 on her second start but she ran a couple of reasonable races this January and returns from a break on another career-low mark; effective over C&D and might not be far away."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Cosi Bear",
        "jockey": "Daniel Muscutt",
        "trainer": "James Fanshawe",
        "ts": "56",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "62",
        "form": "82/58",
        "sire": "Kodi Bear",
        "dam_sire": "Lawman",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "51.6",
        "model_pct": "9.2%",
        "fair_odds": "10.88",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "+1.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Following a long layoff she's been down the field in a Kempton novice (7f, Polytrack) and a Lingfield handicap (1m, Polytrack) on her two runs this year; however, she remains very lightly raced and she showed plenty of promise here in October 2024; yard in fine form; no surprise to see a big run."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Alessia Fernanda (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Harry Smith(7)",
        "trainer": "Declan Carroll",
        "ts": "54",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "70",

        "fair_odds": "17.98",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-2.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Her form went the wrong way last season but she returns having had wind surgery and is 7lb lower than when winning on her reappearance last April; trainer had a double here last Saturday; capable of having a big say."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Brave Byreflection",

        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-3.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "She's below her last winning mark and may have needed the run at Kempton this month on her stable debut; however, her form was patchy last season and her claims aren't compelling."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Special Breeze (GB)",

        "ts": "17",
        "rpr": "79",

        "fair_odds": "21.52",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-3.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ran okay when 5l fourth of five in C&D novice last September and it was her first run since when beaten only about 3l in sixth of ten on handicap debut at Beverley (8.4f, turf) a fortnight ago; her pedigree provides optimism that she'll have more to offer and she could be a contender."

    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "The Gay Blade (GB)",
        "jockey": "Andrew Mullen",

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made it three wins in his last four starts (all 6f at Newcastle) when seeing off ten rivals in an apprentice race last week; former C&D scorer so the step back up in trip shouldn't be an issue and he escapes a penalty."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Classy Clarets (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Greg Fairley",
        "trainer": "Iain Jardine",

        "fair_odds": "8.57",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-2.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Back to form on AW for Iain Jardine in recent months, including 6f 0-50 classified win at Wolverhampton; found things happening too quickly for her over 5f in another classified event at Newcastle last time but kept on for a creditable third; 7f winner last year; one of two solid contenders for the yard."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "War Memorial (GB)",
        "jockey": "Oliver Stammers",
        "trainer": "Lawrence Mullaney",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "69",
        "or": "49",

        "dam_sire": "Kyllachy",
        "stall": 11,

        "score": "48.4",
        "model_pct": "10.8%",
        "fair_odds": "9.23",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-11.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Out the back on first four outings for Lawrence Mullaney but big step back in the right direction when second in 7f Southwell classified event seven weeks ago, pulling clear with one who has won and finished a close second in two handicap starts since; his last 11 outings have been on AW but was runner-up over C&D (good) in August 2024; bold show likely if a wide stall isn't too much of an inconvenience."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Filey Beach (IRE)",

        "trainer": "Ruth Carr",
        "ts": "50",
        "rpr": "64",
        "or": "55",
        "form": "1200-8",
        "sire": "Profitable",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "46.5",
        "model_pct": "8.9%",
        "fair_odds": "11.25",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-7.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Did well over C&D for Ruth Carr last autumn; below par in three outings since, although two of those were for another yard, and he was entitled to need his recent first outing back with Ruth Carr after five months off; a return to form wouldn't surprise."
      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Struggled in six runs for Hugo Palmer but he sprang a 66-1 surprise on his 7f Newcastle stable debut in December; hasn't come close to backing that up in two subsequent outings; now fitted with first-time cheekpieces back on turf."

        "edge": "-1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ex-Irish; sold for 2,600gns to join current yard in January; fair effort when fourth of 11 in a classified on stable debut at Wolverhampton (6f) last month but well behind The Gay Blade at Newcastle last month; hood off, refitted tongue-tie and first-time cheekpieces combination on."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "Due Respect (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Rhys Elliott(5)",
        "trainer": "Gary Rutherford",
        "ts": "61",
        "rpr": "63",
        "or": "53",
        "form": "71498-",
        "sire": "Soldier's Call",
        "dam_sire": "Due Diligence",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "39.3",
        "model_pct": "4.0%",
        "fair_odds": "24.71",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "-1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Came good in a first-time visor at Redcar (7f, good to soft) last July but the headgear didn't work as well in her three subsequent starts last year and is left off for her reappearance; others are more persuasive."
      }
    ]
  },
  {

        "spotlight": "Two soft-ground turf wins, including one for this yard, but he acts on better ground and made the most of a good draw when close third of 15 at Nottingham (8.5f, good; Token Love seventh) in cheekpieces three weeks ago; that is just about the best recent form on offer and he's nicely berthed again; visor goes on and he's respected."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won on turf as a 2yo for Clive Cox; dual AW winner (1m/7f) for this yard in January but poor last time when the race reportedly came too soon; has been freshened up and might bounce back."

        "edge": "-6.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "One win (7f, good to firm) from 11 starts but can generally be relied upon to run her race and it was another solid effort when second at Ayr (1m, soft) in September; ground/trip fine and market may reveal whether she's tuned up for this reappearance; big player if so."
      },
      {

        "edge": "-6.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Yet to score but he went close at Wolverhampton (9.5f, AW) in December and was only beaten 3l despite finishing in midfield at Nottingham (8.5f, good; Powerful Response third) on his return three weeks ago; shaped well that day (hit the front before fading) and he's a candidate to build on that despite being drawn widest."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,

        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-7.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Six turf wins include one here (1m2f, good to firm) in August; had wind surgery before a fair comeback at Doncaster (1m, good to soft) in March and built on that when fifth of 14 at Nottingham (1m2f, good) 11 days ago; drop back in trip no reason to rule him out and he's respected."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Not at the top of his game on AW on his last three starts but he won off today's mark at Chelmsford (7f, AW) in February and his sole run here yielded a C&D win in May 2024; versatile ground-wise; not written off."
      },
      {

        "best_dec": "11.00",

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "He made a winning reappearance here in 2024 and 2025 so it's disconcerting he was well beaten on his comeback here 24 days ago, and he could do with breaking sharper; however, it's possible he needed the run this time and, having won three times last year, he's entitled to respect."

      }
    ]
